ns1:revision.ns1:comment: /* Lustre Software Releases */ update for recent releases
ns1:revision.ns1:text:
= Lustre Software Releases =
=== Current Maintenance Release ===
* [[Lustre_2.15.2_Changelog | Lustre 2.15.2]] ** Released [http://lustre.org/lustre-2-15-2-released/ January 11, 2023]
=== Current Major Release ===
* [[Release_2.15.0 | Lustre 2.15.0]] ** Released [http://lustre.org/lustre-2-15-0-released/ June 16, 2022] ** [[Lustre_2.15.0_Changelog | Changelog]]
=== Major Release In Development ===
* [[Release_2.16.0 | Lustre 2.16.0]]
=== Release Roadmap ===
* [http://www.lustre.org/roadmap Release Roadmap]
=== Previous Releases === * [[Release_2.14.0 | Lustre 2.14.0]] ** [[Lustre_2.14.0_Changelog]] * [[Release_2.13.0 | Lustre 2.13.0]] ** [[Lustre_2.13.0_Changelog]] * [[Release_2.12.0 | Lustre 2.12.0]] ** [[Lustre_2.12.0_Changelog]] ** [[Lustre_2.12.1_Changelog]] ** [[Lustre_2.12.2_Changelog]] ** [[Lustre_2.12.3_Changelog]] ** [[Lustre_2.12.4_Changelog]] ** [[Lustre_2.12.5_Changelog]] ** [[Lustre_2.12.6_Changelog]] ** [[Lustre_2.12.7_Changelog]] ** [[Lustre_2.12.8_Changelog]] ** [[Lustre_2.12.9_Changelog]] * [[Release_2.11.0 | Lustre 2.11.0]] * [[Release_2.10.0 | Lustre 2.10.0]] ** [[Lustre_2.10.0_Changelog]] ** [[Lustre_2.10.1_Changelog]] ** [[Lustre_2.10.2_Changelog]] ** [[Lustre_2.10.3_Changelog]] ** [[Lustre_2.10.4_Changelog]] ** [[Lustre_2.10.5_Changelog]] ** [[Lustre_2.10.6_Changelog]] ** [[Lustre_2.10.7_Changelog]] ** [[Lustre_2.10.8_Changelog]] * [[Release_2.9.0 | Lustre 2.9.0]] * [[Release_2.8.0 | Lustre 2.8.0]] * [[Release_2.7.0 | Lustre 2.7.0]] * [[Release_2.6.0 | Lustre 2.6.0]] * [[Release_2.5.0 | Lustre 2.5.0]] * [[Release_2.4.0 | Lustre 2.4.0]] * [[Release_2.3.0 | Lustre 2.3.0]] * [[Release_2.2.0 | Lustre 2.2.0]] * [[Release_2.1.0 | Lustre 2.1.0]] * [[Release_2.0 | Lustre 2.0.0]] * [[Release_1.8 | Lustre 1.8]] * [[Change_Log_1.6 | Lustre 1.6]]
